name: Meddl Dash
short_description: In this unique adventure you have to drive Ford Blu as far as possible on the highway without getting caught by the haters. Visit exciting places such as zoos, motel ones and motorway service stations on your tour of Germany. Meddl.
detailed_description:
Meddl Dash is a racing game with a special twist. You play as a Ford Blu and race down the highway while trying to avoid your pursuers, the "haters". The game offers a varied route that takes you through different parts of Germany. You can make exciting stops at zoos, motels and rest areas. There are different cars to obtain, which are customizable.

The goal of the game is to get as far as possible without being caught by the haters.
